page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t6-c1m4.large is a burstable virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor built on the x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance is configured with 2 vCPUs, 2 physical cores, and 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and the baseline network bandwidth is rated at 0 Gbps.

Benchmark results place this instance in the lower performance tiers. The stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests scored 1161.28 and 2371.48 respectively, both falling into the bottom 25% of tested hardware. Memory performance is similarly constrained, with a PassMark memory score of 1168.91 and uncached large-block read bandwidth of 22.38 GB/sec, placing it in the bottom 10% to 25% range. Database operations and static web serving throughput also registered in the bottom 10%, with Redis SET operations achieving 2.61 million operations per second.

Due to its burstable CPU allocation model and entry-level performance profile, this instance offers a cost-effective solution for workloads with low baseline CPU utilization that experience occasional spikes. It is not suitable for sustained high-performance computing, large-scale databases, or memory-intensive applications. Appropriate workloads include low-traffic web servers, development or testing environments, lightweight microservices, and basic background task processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t6-c1m4.large is a burstable, KVM-based virtual machine designed for entry-level workloads. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz, providing 2 vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM. The instance does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators, and baseline network bandwidth is 0 Gbps. Benchmark evaluations indicate modest performance, with stress-ng CPU scores and memory bandwidth metrics placing the instance in the bottom 25% of tested hardware. Database operations and static web serving throughput also rank in the bottom 10%. Given its burstable CPU allocation, this instance is a cost-effective option for resource-light applications. It is best suited for low-traffic web hosting, development and testing environments, and lightweight background tasks that do not require sustained high-performance compute resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t6-c1m4.large is a burstable instance featuring 2 vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor, designed for low-intensity workloads and development environments.

tagline: A burstable, budget-friendly virtual machine with balanced memory for lightweight workloads, development environments, and low-traffic applications.
bullet_points: Powered by a 2.5 GHz Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with 2 vCPUs.
Equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory and no local storage.
Utilizes a burstable CPU allocation model for cost-efficient scaling.
Suited for low-traffic web serving, microservices, and testing.
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization on x86_64 architecture.
